title.ro: Pachet de prompturi pentru scriere creativÄƒ

content.en:
Generate a creative writing prompt pack with 5 diverse prompts connected to the theme of [theme/topic] for [grade level] students.

For each prompt include:
- The prompt itself (2â€“3 sentences, vivid and open-ended)
- A genre tag (e.g. mystery, sci-fi, realistic fiction, poetry, personal narrative)
- A difficulty level (beginner / intermediate / advanced)
- One 'spark question' to help students who feel stuck
- A word count target (e.g. 150â€“200 words)

Ensure the prompts are culturally inclusive, age-appropriate, and encourage original thinking. Include at least one prompt that can be adapted for students who prefer drawing or oral storytelling instead of writing.
content.ro:

Pentru fiecare prompt include:
- Promptul propriu-zis (2â€“3 propoziÈ›ii, viu È™i deschis)
- O etichetÄƒ de gen (ex. mister, science-fiction, ficÈ›iune realistÄƒ, poezie, naraÈ›iune personalÄƒ)
- Un nivel de dificultate (Ã®ncepÄƒtor / intermediar / avansat)
- O 'Ã®ntrebare scÃ¢nteie' pentru elevii care se simt blocaÈ›i
- Un target de numÄƒr de cuvinte (ex. 150â€“200 de cuvinte)

AsigurÄƒ-te cÄƒ prompturile sunt incluzive cultural, adecvate vÃ¢rstei È™i Ã®ncurajeazÄƒ gÃ¢ndirea originalÄƒ. Include cel puÈ›in un prompt care poate fi adaptat pentru elevii care preferÄƒ desenul sau povestirea oralÄƒ Ã®n loc de scriere.

title.ro: Designer de unitate PBL (Ã®nvÄƒÈ›are bazatÄƒ pe proiect)

content.en:
Design a 2-week project-based learning (PBL) unit on [topic] for [grade level] students.

Include:
1. Driving Question: one compelling, open-ended question that anchors the whole project
2. Learning standards / objectives addressed (3â€“5)
3. Week 1 overview: daily activities, mini-lessons, research and investigation tasks
4. Week 2 overview: product development, peer feedback, presentation preparation
5. Final product options: give students 3 choices of how to present/demonstrate their learning (e.g. poster, video, report, prototype)
6. Assessment plan: formative checkpoints + final product rubric summary
7. Cross-curricular connections: link to at least 2 other subjects
8. Resources and materials list

Make the unit relevant to students' real lives and local context.
content.ro:
ProiecteazÄƒ o unitate de Ã®nvÄƒÈ›are bazatÄƒ pe proiect (PBL) de 2 sÄƒptÄƒmÃ¢ni pe tema [subiect] pentru clasa [nivel].

Include:
1. ÃŽntrebarea motrice: o Ã®ntrebare convingÄƒtoare, deschisÄƒ, care ancoreazÄƒ Ã®ntregul proiect
2. Standarde / obiective de Ã®nvÄƒÈ›are abordate (3â€“5)
3. Prezentare generalÄƒ a SÄƒptÄƒmÃ¢nii 1: activitÄƒÈ›i zilnice, mini-lecÈ›ii, sarcini de cercetare È™i investigare
4. Prezentare generalÄƒ a SÄƒptÄƒmÃ¢nii 2: dezvoltarea produsului, feedback Ã®ntre colegi, pregÄƒtirea prezentÄƒrii
5. OpÈ›iuni pentru produsul final: oferÄƒ elevilor 3 modalitÄƒÈ›i de prezentare/demonstrare a Ã®nvÄƒÈ›Äƒrii (ex. poster, video, referat, prototip)
6. Planul de evaluare: puncte de control formative + rezumatul rubricii pentru produsul final
7. Conexiuni inter-disciplinare: legÄƒturÄƒ cu cel puÈ›in 2 alte discipline
8. ListÄƒ de resurse È™i materiale

FÄƒ unitatea relevantÄƒ pentru viaÈ›a realÄƒ a elevilor È™i contextul local.

title.ro: Designer de escape room pentru clasÄƒ

content.en:
Create a classroom escape room concept for reviewing [subject/topic] with [grade level] students. The scenario should be narrative-driven and motivating.

Provide:
1. Scenario setup: a short, engaging story that frames the challenge (2â€“3 sentences)
2. 4 puzzle stations: for each station describe
   - The educational content being reviewed
   - The puzzle format (cipher, matching, multiple choice lock, QR code, etc.)
   - The 'clue' or answer that unlocks the next station
3. Time recommendation and group size
4. Materials needed (printable / digital)
5. Differentiation tip: how to make it easier or harder for mixed ability groups
6. Debrief questions for after the activity (3 questions connecting the game to the learning objectives)

Keep it achievable with standard classroom materials.
content.ro:
CreeazÄƒ un concept de escape room pentru clasÄƒ pentru recapitularea [disciplinei/subiectului] cu elevii din clasa [nivel]. Scenariul trebuie sÄƒ fie narativ È™i motivant.

OferÄƒ:
1. Configurarea scenariului: o poveste scurtÄƒ È™i atractivÄƒ care cadru provocarea (2â€“3 propoziÈ›ii)
2. 4 staÈ›ii cu puzzle: pentru fiecare staÈ›ie descrie
   - ConÈ›inutul educaÈ›ional recapitulat
   - Formatul puzzle-ului (cifru, potrivire, lacÄƒt cu alegere multiplÄƒ, cod QR etc.)
   - 'Indiciul' sau rÄƒspunsul care deblocheazÄƒ staÈ›ia urmÄƒtoare
3. Recomandare de timp È™i dimensiunea grupului
4. Materiale necesare (tipÄƒrite / digitale)
5. Sfat de diferenÈ›iere: cum sÄƒ-l faci mai uÈ™or sau mai greu pentru grupuri cu abilitÄƒÈ›i mixte
6. ÃŽntrebÄƒri de debrief dupÄƒ activitate (3 Ã®ntrebÄƒri care leagÄƒ jocul de obiectivele de Ã®nvÄƒÈ›are)

PÄƒstreazÄƒ-l realizabil cu materialele standard din clasÄƒ.
